subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God! By Thy might, my liver hath been rent asunder through separation and exile from Thee, and my heart hath become entangled through remoteness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: فسبحانک یا الهی فوعزتک ان کبدی تقطعت من هجرک و فراقک و قلبی تشبکت من بعدی
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
